overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking along a tropical beach with post-apocalyptic ruins in the background. The character traverses sand, shallow water, and approaches overgrown ancient structures under bright sunlight.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beach beside tropical flowers and palm trees

entered.detail: white sand underfoot along the shoreline
turquoise ocean water with gentle waves
tall palm trees lining the beach
dense patches of pink and purple flowering vegetation
ruined skyscrapers and structures visible in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a tropical beach with white sand underfoot. To the right, dense patches of pink tropical flowers and palm trees line the shore, while turquoise ocean water laps at the left. In the distance, the ruins of ancient skyscrapers rise against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal waters with open bay view

events.description: character steps from dry sand into shallow ocean water, revealing open bay view
character turns slightly left while wading to face the open bay and distant ruins

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow turquoise water along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow turquoise water, transitioning from sand to wading. The view opens up to reveal the open bay with distant ruined skyscrapers across the water. The tropical vegetation falls behind as the character moves through the gentle surf.

events.description: exits shallow water back onto dry sand approaching large rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking on dry sand toward ancient ruins and rock outcroppings

entered.detail: large stone ruins covered in green vegetation rising from the beach

segments.scene_description: Returning to dry sand, the character approaches large rock formations and ruins covered in dense greenery. The beach curves toward these ancient structures while the ocean remains visible to the left. Distant ruined skyscrapers loom in the background across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between rock wall and ocean

events.description: enters narrow coastal passage alongside tall vegetation-covered rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow passage with overgrown ruins on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow passage between a towering rock wall covered in dense tropical vegetation on the right and the ocean on the left. The space becomes more enclosed as the rock face looms close, blocking the view of the distant ruins. The path continues alongside the ancient weathered stone structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a tropical coastline that transitions from an open, sun-drenched beach into a narrow, enclosed passage of ancient ruins. It begins with the character walking across white sand bordered by pink tropical flowers and palm trees, with ruined skyscrapers looming in the distance. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from sand to shallow turquoise water, opening the view toward a wide bay before returning to dry land. The scene then expands toward large, greenery-covered rock formations and weathered structures as the beach curves inward. Finally, the path narrows into a tight corridor between the ocean and a towering, vegetation-clad rock wall that looms close and obscures the distant skyline.
